Interface QuerySuffixBuilder

All Known Implementing Classes:
AcuwaveQuerySuffixBuilder, FhirServerQuerySuffixBuilder
public interface QuerySuffixBuilder
Building the templates of the individual REST requests to the Acuwaveles server.

  • Method Details

    • getObservations

      String getObservations(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, Integer month, boolean summary, DataItemContext dataItemContext, boolean httpMethodGet)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiObservation resources.
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      month - The calendar month for which data is requested. (for parallelization).
      summary - Should only the bundle with the total number of found resources be output instead of the data retrieval query?
      httpMethodGet - Is HttpMethod.GET used?
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR observation resources that include a covid finding.

    • getConditions

      String getConditions(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, Integer month, boolean summary, DataItemContext dataItemContext, Boolean httpMethodGet)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiCondition resources.
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      month - The calendar month for which data is requested. (for parallelization)
      summary - Should only the bundle with the total number of found resources be output instead of the data retrieval query?
      httpMethodGet - Is HttpMethod.GET used?
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.

    • getConditions

      String getConditions(AbstractDataRetrievalService acuwaveDataRetrievalService, List<String> encounterIds, Boolean httpMethodGet)

    • getObservations

      String getObservations(AbstractDataRetrievalService fhirDataRetrievalService, DataItemContext dataItemContext, List<String> loincCodes, List<String> encounterIds, Boolean httpMethodGet)

    • getPatients

      String getPatients(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, List<String> patientIdList)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiPatient resources.
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      patientIdList - A list with patient ids used as input criteria.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR patient resources.

    • getPatients

      String getPatients(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, Integer calendarYear)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiPatient resources with birthdate in the given calendar year.
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      calendarYear - The calendar year in which the date of birth must fall.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR patient resources.

    • getEncounters

      String getEncounters(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, List<String> patientIdList, DataItemContext dataItemContext, Boolean askTotal, String individualDateString)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiEncounter resources.
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      patientIdList - A list with patient ids used as input criteria.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR encounter resources.

    • getProcedures

      String getProcedures(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, List<String> patientIdList, List<String> encounterIdList, String systemUrl, Boolean askTotal, List<String> wards, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure resources.
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      encounterIdList - A list with encounter ids used as input criteria.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data.

    • getProceduresPost

      String getProceduresPost(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService, List<String> patientIdList, List<String> encounterIdList, String systemUrl, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure resources.
      Parameters:
      dataRetrievalService - The corresponding data search service.
      encounterIdList - A list with encounter ids used as input criteria.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data.
